query: which segment in our chart of accounts is the cost center?
expected_behavior: Loads oracle-fusion-ledger-coa (KEYSTONE) with oracle-fusion-overview as parent
States that segment meaning (which SEGMENT1..30 is company / cost center / natural account) is per-tenant customer configuration, not a fixed convention
Resolves it via the segment->meaning map in the <customer>-oracle-fusion-glossary produced by oracle-fusion-setup, or offers to run setup if the map is missing
Explains accounts are stored as CODE_COMBINATION_ID (CCID) and decoded via v_code_combination / decode_ccid_segments
anti_behavior: Does NOT answer with a hard-coded segment position (e.g. 'SEGMENT2 is cost center')
Does NOT assume a default chart-of-accounts structure
